About Me

Born in Kibokoni.
Built for this role.

I grew up in Kibokoni, Mvita. I understand the people, languages, culture and expectations of this constituency. I bring discipline, communication, digital skills, discretion and a serious work ethic to campaign support.

User Agreement

This site is for legitimate professional, campaign, employment or verification purposes only. Reference contacts must be used respectfully for serious inquiries.

Privacy Policy

Messages are used only to respond to inquiries. Information is not sold. Avoid sending sensitive documents unless requested through a safe channel.

Security & Privacy

Safe, clear &
professional.

This website is designed as a professional portfolio. It uses simple static-page security practices, clear privacy rules, and respectful handling of reference contacts.

Static WebsiteNo public login system, no payment form, and no hidden account creation.
Safe External LinksSocial links open with security protection using rel="noopener noreferrer".
Browser ProtectionSecurity meta rules limit scripts, objects, permissions, and referrer leakage where supported.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: July 14, 2026
  • Information you share: If you contact me, you may share your name, email, phone number, subject and message.
  • How it is used: Your information is used only to respond to serious professional, campaign, employment, verification or interview inquiries.
  • No selling: Your personal information is not sold, rented or traded.
  • Reference contacts: Referee phone numbers are provided for serious verification only and must be used respectfully.
  • External links: Instagram, TikTok, Snapchat, WhatsApp and email links may open third-party services with their own privacy practices.
  • Local storage: The site may remember your consent choice in your browser. This does not create an account.
  • Sensitive documents: Do not send ID documents or private files unless requested through a safe channel.
  • Removal/correction: You may email [email protected] to request correction or removal of your message details.

User Agreement

Professional use only
  • Use this website respectfully and only for legitimate professional, campaign, employment or verification purposes.
  • Do not misuse, scrape, republish or harass the listed reference contacts.
  • Do not copy this portfolio content or impersonate Mohammed Abubakar.
  • Certificate images are portfolio evidence; official verification links are provided where available.
  • Work samples are examples of capability and are not confidential campaign documents.
  • The website may be updated to improve accuracy, security, privacy and presentation.
